text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 04. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
